case_title: ERIC S. WILLIAMS VS. KEIKO MURASE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, ERIC S. AS TO DEFENDANT MURASE, KEIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED AUG-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURASE, KEIKO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY WILLIAMS, ERIC S. MURASE, KEIKO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ERIC S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURASE, KEIKO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MURASE, KEIKO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
